name: ACCESS Newswire Inc.
summary: ACCESS Newswire Inc. (formerly Issuer Direct Corporation) is a Delaware-based SaaS company offering a communications platform for PR and IR professionals. Core products include press release distribution (under ACCESS Newswire, Newswire.com, PressRelease.com), media monitoring, media database and pitching, investor relations websites, and earnings/event technologies. The company serves thousands of customers from startups to global brands, focusing on small and mid-market businesses with 2–2,000 employees, with 974 subscriptions and approximately $12.2 million ARR as of December 31, 2025.

products.name: ACCESS PR
products.description: Subscription including press release distribution, media monitoring, pitching and database.

products.name: ACCESS IR
products.description: Subscription including investor relations website, quarterly earnings calls, and press release distribution.

products.name: ALL ACCESS
products.description: Combined subscription encompassing both ACCESS PR and ACCESS IR features.

products.name: Press Release Distribution
products.description: News dissemination and media outreach under ACCESS Newswire, Newswire.com, and PressRelease.com brands.

products.name: Media Database
products.description: Curated database of actively publishing journalists, sorted by industry, publication, and article history.

products.name: Media Pitching
products.description: Tool to contact journalists with AI writing assistance via AIMee recommendation engine.

products.name: Media Monitoring
products.description: Brand monitoring across print, broadcast, web, radio, video, blogs, and social media.

products.name: Media Room
products.description: Add-on newsroom page builder with brand asset manager and contact manager.

products.name: Press Release Optimizer (PRO)
products.description: Automated media and marketing communications service delivering targeted messaging.
